Bug / Task Description: Registering a schema version is rejected with a version-mismatch error even when the caller supplies the correct next version. The expected next version is computed one too low (it equals the count of existing versions rather than the next sequential number after them), so the very first registration expecting version 1 fails. Fix the expected-version computation so a subject with N existing versions accepts the next as version N+1.
Commit Subject: fix(schemastore): expected next version is count plus one
